title: • Blends creativity and personal progression.
content:
• Blends creativity and personal progression.

🎭 4. Mastery Exams – Risk & Reward System

📜 Newly Named: “The Thought Purity Test”
✔ If a student fails, they receive a status effect.
✔ If a student passes all three levels, they “Overthrow the Professor” and run a class session.
✔ If a student passes only two exams, they receive a “Golden Quill” and can revise any one assignment.
✔ Mastery exams now scale difficulty based on literary complexity.

Difficulty Tiers
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 68 (chunk 68/555)
